title: phlomis umbrosa var. typica
intro: Phlomis umbrosa var. typica, also known as Jerusalem sage, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its shrubby habit and fragrant, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomis umbrosa var. typica include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Phlomis umbrosa var. typica typically involve infusions or teas made from the leaves, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties or used topically for skin issues.
